_description: Universal BigQuery validation SQL patterns — client-agnostic, applicable to any roster

validation_structure.pattern: Each validation returns NULL (pass) or error message string (fail)
validation_structure.aggregation: ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(err WHERE err IS NOT NULL), ', ') AS Business_Validations
validation_structure.separation: Rows with non-empty Business_Validations → errors; empty → clean
validation_structure.nppes_join: LEFT JOIN nppes_raw ON NPI for existence check
validation_structure.duplicate_check: COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TO_JSON_STRING(row)) as dup_ct

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.NPI AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.NPI AS STRING), r'^\d{10}$'), 'NPI must be exactly 10 digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: NPI must be exactly 10 digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.NPI AS STRING)), '') != '' AND n.NPI IS NULL, 'Invalid NPI as per NPPES Record', NULL)
validations.error_message: Invalid NPI as per NPPES Record
validations.note: Requires LEFT JOIN to nppes_raw table. Fallback to NPPES API for failed NPIs.

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.NPI), '') != '' AND n.NPI IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(t.First_Name)), r'[^A-Z]', '') != REGEXP_REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(n.Provider_First_Name)), r'[^A-Z]', ''), CONCAT('Provider Name is not matching with NPPES record - As per NPPES First Name: ', n.Provider_First_Name, ' Last Name: ', n.Provider_Last_Name), NULL)
validations.error_message: Provider Name is not matching with NPPES record
validations.note: Written to Warning column, NOT Business_Validations. Alpha-only case-insensitive comparison.

validations.sql: Check enumeration_type from NPPES API response: NPI-1 = Individual, NPI-2 = Organization
validations.note: Only checked via API fallback, not in BQ SQL directly

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Group_NPI AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.Group_NPI AS STRING), r'^\d{10}$'), 'Group NPI must be exactly 10 digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: Group NPI must be exactly 10 digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Group_NPI AS STRING)), '') != '' AND gn.NPI IS NULL, 'Invalid Group NPI as per NPPES Record', NULL)
validations.error_message: Invalid Group NPI as per NPPES Record

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Tax_Identification_Number AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.Tax_Identification_Number AS STRING), r'^\d{9}$'), 'Tax ID must be exactly 9 digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: Tax ID must be exactly 9 digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.SSN AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.SSN AS STRING), r'^\d{9}$'), 'SSN must be exactly 9 digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: SSN must be exactly 9 digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.CAQH_ID AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.CAQH_ID AS STRING), r'^\d{7,8}$'), 'CAQH ID must be 7 or 8 digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: CAQH ID must be 7 or 8 digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Medicare_ID AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.Medicare_ID AS STRING), r'^[a-zA-Z0-9]{5,20}$'), 'Medicare ID must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters', NULL)
validations.error_message: Medicare ID must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Medicaid_ID AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.Medicaid_ID AS STRING), r'^[a-zA-Z0-9]{5,20}$'), 'Medicaid ID must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters', NULL)
validations.error_message: Medicaid ID must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Medicaid_State), '') != '' AND IFNULL(TRIM(t.Medicaid_ID), '') = '', 'Medicaid ID is required when Medicaid State is provided', NULL)
validations.error_message: Medicaid ID is required when Medicaid State is provided

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Zip AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.Zip AS STRING), r'^(\d{5}(-\d{4})?|\d{9})$'), 'Zip must be 5 digits, 5+4, or 9 digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: Zip must be 5 digits, 5+4, or 9 digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.State AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(UPPER(CAST(t.State AS STRING)), r'^[A-Z]{2}$'), 'State must be a 2-letter code', NULL)
validations.error_message: State must be a 2-letter code

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.State), '') != '' AND UPPER(TRIM(t.State)) NOT IN UNNEST(['AL','AK',...,'WY','DC','PR']), 'State must be a valid state per reference', NULL)
validations.error_message: State must be a valid state per reference

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.First_Name), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(t.First_Name, r'^[A-Za-z\s\-\']+$'), 'First Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes', NULL)
validations.error_message: First Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Email), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(t.Email, r'^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'), 'Email must be a valid email address', NULL)
validations.error_message: Email must be a valid email address

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Gender), '') != '' AND UPPER(TRIM(t.Gender)) NOT IN ('M','F','U','UNKNOWN','NOT LISTED'), 'Gender must be M, F, U, Unknown, or Not Listed', NULL)
validations.error_message: Gender must be M, F, U, Unknown, or Not Listed

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.Phone AS STRING)), '') != '' AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(CAST(t.Phone AS STRING), r'^\d{10}$'), 'Phone can only contain exactly 10 numeric digits', NULL)
validations.error_message: Phone can only contain exactly 10 numeric digits

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Date_Col), '') != '' AND SAFE_CAST(TRIM(t.Date_Col) AS DATE) IS NULL, 'Date must be a valid date', NULL)
validations.error_message: Date must be a valid date

validations.sql: IF(SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', TRIM(t.Date_Col)) < DATE('1901-01-01'), 'Date is an obsolete date', NULL)
validations.error_message: Date is an obsolete date

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Primary_Taxonomy), '') != '' AND UPPER(TRIM(t.Primary_Taxonomy)) NOT IN UNNEST(nucc_codes), 'Invalid Taxonomy as per NUCC List', NULL)
validations.error_message: Invalid Taxonomy as per NUCC List

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Degree_1), '') != '' AND UPPER(TRIM(t.Degree_1)) NOT IN UNNEST(valid_degrees), CONCAT(t.Degree_1, ' is not a recognized Degree'), NULL)
validations.error_message: {value} is not a recognized Degree

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(t.Language), '') != '' AND UPPER(TRIM(t.Language)) NOT IN UNNEST(valid_languages), 'Language is not a recognized language', NULL)
validations.error_message: Language is not a recognized language

validations.sql: IF(IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.{column} AS STRING)), '') = '', '{column_name} is required but is empty', NULL)
validations.error_message: {column_name} is required but is empty
validations.note: Required columns differ per template and transaction type (term vs non-term)

validations.sql: IF(UPPER(TRIM(t.Transaction_Type)) IN ('TERM','TERM ROLE','TERMINATE FROM LOCATION','TERMINATE FROM NETWORK') AND IFNULL(TRIM(CAST(t.{column} AS STRING)), '') = '', '{column_name} is required for termination but is empty', NULL)
validations.error_message: {column_name} is required for termination but is empty

validations.sql: IF(t.dup_ct > 1, 'Duplicate row found within the file', NULL)
validations.error_message: Duplicate row found within the file
validations.note: Uses: COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TO_JSON_STRING((SELECT AS STRUCT t.* EXCEPT(Business_Validations)))) as dup_ct

nppes_validation_flow.step_1_bq_check: LEFT JOIN nppes_raw ON NPI — check existence
nppes_validation_flow.step_2_identify_failures: Query Business_Validations for 'Invalid NPI as per NPPES Record'
nppes_validation_flow.step_4_update_results: If API valid: remove error. If API invalid: update with API status.
nppes_validation_flow.step_5_name_check: Compare file first/last name vs NPPES provider name (alpha-only, case-insensitive). Mismatch → Warning column.
nppes_validation_flow.step_6_entity_type: NPI-1 = Individual practitioner. NPI-2 = Organization. Report in logs.
